nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.task_description: Implement hybrid A+B formal model sync
nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.approach: Add --sync mode to model-driven-fix that skips diagnosis phases and auto-detects formal coverage intersection in executor to trigger automatic model sync when code changes intersect model-registry coverage or plan declares formal_artifacts: update.
out_of_scope: Modifying the full 7-phase model-driven-fix workflow for non-sync execution mode
Adding new formal verification checkers or extending model-constrained-fix.cjs
Changing the model-registry schema or coverage indexing structure
Implementing rollback or versioning for formal specification changes
Supporting formal_artifacts: create declarations in --sync mode (update only)
